evals.prompt: Audit this Rust workspace against the Tailrocks baseline. Do not edit or install.
evals.expected_output: A read-only tooling and workspace gap report.

evals.prompt: Scaffold a strict Rust 2024 workspace from the bundled templates using current compatible stable tools.
Use the newest nightly toolchain because its version is newer.
evals.expected_output: Reject unexamined prerelease selection and require explicit need and approval.
